name: SNAP TO GRID
conditioned_path: oddly-satisfying restock and shelf-filling loops on TikTok
mechanic: Scattered tiles float on a canvas; drag each one to its ghost outline until it snaps perfectly into place. Every clean snap fires a soft click and the tile locks with a glimmer, building a complete orderly grid from chaos.

name: MIRROR LINE
conditioned_path: symmetry-check and before/after cleaning videos
mechanic: One half of the canvas shows a fixed pattern of shapes; drag shapes onto the blank half to mirror it perfectly. A symmetry meter ticks toward 100% as you match each element across the center axis.

name: COLOR SORT JAR
conditioned_path: color-matching and candy-sorting ASMR feeds
mechanic: Mixed colored beads fill a jar; tap a bead to select it, then tap a target jar to transfer it. Sort every bead into its matching jar until each container holds only one color and the screen settles into stillness.

name: POWER WASH TILE
conditioned_path: pressure-washing and power-wash ASMR that never fully cleans the last corner
mechanic: A dirty tiled floor fills the canvas; drag your thumb slowly across it to reveal the clean surface underneath. The percentage cleaned ticks upward in the corner; when it hits 100% the final reveal blooms and the session ends.

name: SHELF RESTOCK
conditioned_path: store-restock and grocery-facing ASMR that loops before the last row is done
mechanic: An empty shelf grid sits center-screen; products drift in from the side and you tap each one to place it in the correct slot by color or size. When every slot is filled the shelf glows complete and the loop ends instead of resetting.

name: ALIGN CENTER
conditioned_path: slightly-off text and design layouts that bother you on every scroll
mechanic: A block of text or an icon sits visibly off-center on a canvas; drag it millimeter by millimeter until the alignment guides snap and the element locks exactly in the middle. The tension dissolves audibly when center is found.

name: FOLD PERFECT
conditioned_path: laundry-folding and closet-organization ASMR that pauses on the messy drawer
mechanic: A shirt shape sits on the canvas with fold-line guides; swipe along each guide in sequence to fold it into a tight square. Imprecise swipes leave a crease indicator; a clean fold earns a crisp snap and the shirt stacks perfectly.

name: CLOSE THE LOOP
conditioned_path: open-tab and notification-pile anxiety that the feed farms instead of resolving
mechanic: Circles with small gaps drift across the canvas; drag the open end of each arc closed so the circle snaps shut with a soft ring tone. Each closed loop dims and sinks, and when all loops are closed the canvas goes quiet.

name: TILE FILL
conditioned_path: incomplete mosaic and pixel-fill ASMR where the last tile never arrives
mechanic: A grid has a handful of empty cells; tap each empty cell to fill it with the matching color drawn from the surrounding pattern. When every cell is filled the mosaic pulses once in satisfaction and the game ends.

name: STACK EXACT
conditioned_path: block-stacking and book-stacking videos where the pile always wobbles
mechanic: Blocks drop one at a time from above; tap at the precise moment each block aligns with the one below to stack it flush. A perfect stack accumulates without wobble; at ten blocks the tower glows and the session completes.

name: LEVEL IT
conditioned_path: slightly-tilted photo and crooked-shelf videos that halt before they're fixed
mechanic: A framed picture or object sits at a slight angle on the wall; drag the rotation dial slowly until the bubble in the spirit-level indicator settles dead center. Hold it level for two seconds and it clicks into place and hangs straight.

name: RESTORE ORDER
conditioned_path: messy-desk and clutter-clearing ASMR that stops right before the last item is put away
mechanic: A room scene has objects scattered out of place; tap each misplaced object and tap its correct spot to return it. As each item snaps home a calm ambient note plays; when the last object is placed the room settles into perfect stillness.

name: SYMMETRY BUILD
conditioned_path: mandala-drawing and geometric-pattern ASMR that loops before the shape closes
mechanic: Tap on the left half of the canvas to place a shape; its mirror image appears on the right simultaneously. Build out a symmetric composition tile by tile until a full mandala blooms and the canvas fades to rest.

name: SORT RUSH
conditioned_path: sorting and categorizing ASMR that speeds up until items fall off the edge
mechanic: Items with labels (color, shape, size) pour in from the top; swipe each one left or right into the correct bin before the lane clogs. Wrong sorts cost a second; a clean run chains into a speed multiplier. Dare-share your sort streak.

name: SYM SNAP
conditioned_path: spot-the-difference and symmetry-challenge clips where the answer is withheld
mechanic: Two halves of a pattern appear; drag the movable piece until both halves are perfectly symmetrical. Your accuracy percentage is calculated to two decimal places and stamped as your shareable score — dare friends to beat your %.

name: CLEAN SWEEP
conditioned_path: speed-cleaning and clutter-blitz videos that end before every surface is wiped
mechanic: A cluttered room grid shows dirty zones; swipe to clean each cell in the fastest possible order. Your completion time is recorded and displayed — dare a friend to clean the same room faster.

name: GRID FILL
conditioned_path: tetris-filling and inventory-management ASMR where one block always sticks out
mechanic: An irregular grid has empty cells of varying shapes; drag puzzle-piece fragments into the empty spaces to fill the grid without gaps or overlaps. When the last piece locks in and the grid is complete, the entire surface glows and dims to black.

name: INK FILL
conditioned_path: paint-fill and ink-drip ASMR where the color always stops before the last corner
mechanic: An outlined shape sits empty; hold your thumb to let ink spread from your touch point and flood-fill the outline. Lift too early and a gap remains; hold until ink reaches every edge and the outline dissolves into a clean solid shape.

name: DECLUTTER TAP
conditioned_path: minimalism and throw-away ASMR that lingers on the crowded surface before release
mechanic: A shelf of objects appears; some have a faint grey glow marking them as clutter. Tap each glowing object to remove it with a gentle poof. When only the essential items remain and the shelf breathes, the session closes with a quiet exhale sound.

name: MATCH THE GAP
conditioned_path: spacing-check and whitespace-OCD in design tutorials that zoom in on uneven margins
mechanic: Three objects sit in a row with one gap visibly wrong; drag the middle object left or right until the two gaps are exactly equal. When the gaps match within a pixel, the objects lock and the uneven tension releases into a satisfied chime.
